creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Submitter and Maintainer,

we don't have any patch here in the trail of this PR. If you have a 
patch that fixes this issue, could you please send it to us? If it was 
just overlooked and no patch is available, could you please test if this 
issue still exist with an up-to-date ports tree?

Thanks in advance,
Gabor Kovesdan
